message: is staring with a scary face.
I feel like everyone is looking this way, maybe because she's by my side.
This situation is making me dizzy.
So cute.
There's no need to act uncool and look around in front of her.
How adorable she is!
But I suppose I shouldn't be just staring.
Right in front of me is the genuine popular talent.
She is.
When I actually met her,
although her way of speaking is somewhat childish, she was a stunning beauty that made my heart race.
A beautiful girl in a cute outfit, with long hair styled in curls. I think she's still 16.
This sweet voice and big eyes seem to have something that tugs at a man's heart.
When you see her up close, her radiance is unlike that of an ordinary girl.
That hits me hard.
Hey, hey, I want to hear lots of stories from you☆
Haha, I don't really have any stories to share.
Not at all.
Mukamuka　Pun!
Will you please listen to my request?
No, really, there's hardly any story to tell.
I mean, there's absolutely none.
No way, don't tease me like that!
Teasing is out of the question!
Geez!
Could it be that...
Do you hate that?
N-no, not at all!
Oh! By the way, I didn’t catch the detective’s name!
Ah, I’m
Snipes.
Right.
Is it okay if I call you that?
Of course.
I'm so happy!
Ah!
Hey,
is being a detective thrilling?
Uh, well, I guess I could say that?
What do you mean by that?
Come on, you better talk to me seriously!
Even if you say that,
I don't really know how to express it.
I want you to tell me about it.
Eh?
You want to hear about me? That's no good.
I don't really care about myself.
But as a fan, I want to hear even the tiniest things!
Huh?! You're a fan of mine,
san?
Uh, yeah.
I'm so happy!
I'm really, really happy!!
You see, I lost my parents early and grew up in an orphanage. It was
them who freed me from that life.
Where did you meet them?
They came to the coffee shop where I was working part-time,
and invited me to this job there.
Phew.
So that's how you met, huh?
Yeah, it was all just a coincidence.
But I think all meetings are actually fated.
Still, I don't think I was meant for this kind of life.
I'm anxious about how long this life of mine will last.
You're so easy to talk to because you seem like a nice detective!
Hehe, Jennifer finally arrived. I'm so happy!
Are you close with Jennifer?
Yeah! But just to clarify, it’s not like a romantic thing or anything. It’s more like a sisterly bond.
I see. So you met at work, right?
That's right. Work can be fun or not, you know, a bit of everything.
Since I only see you smiling, it seems like you're having a good time.
That's just my sales smile.
Because, being human, it’s tough at times. I vent to her about such things.
To Jennifer!? That means...
If you're that popular, I'm sure people would talk even if you stayed silent, but you share those complaints?
I totally spill my guts to Jennifer, who's now the talk of the town!
Hehe, I’m such an important person, aren’t I?
But I don’t just unload all my frustrations. I forget annoying things quickly because I'm so forgetful. Hehe.
That's nice.
Yup, I think that’s one of the traits that suit me for this profession.
Hey, don’t you think these parties are boring?
What kind of parties aren’t boring?
I think live parties at clubs wouldn’t be boring!
I'm not a fan of this adult atmosphere.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
